That deposit is YOUR money. If they deducted fake charges or missed the legal deadline, fight back. At Deposits-Back.com, create a professional demand letter in under a minute for 20 bucks. No subscription. No signup. Just results.

short_form_scripts.hook_text: What to do when landlord doesn't return deposit
short_form_scripts.voiceover: Step one: Stop texting them. Step two: Know your rights. In most states, landlords must return your deposit within 21 to 30 days and provide an itemized list of deductions. Step three: Send a formal demand letter. Not a handwritten note—a legal demand letter. At Deposits-Back.com, we generate it in 60 seconds for $19.99. No account needed. Send it today, get paid tomorrow.

content_brief.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's Your 60-Second Fix

Normal wear and tear is not a valid reason to withhold a security deposit

Deposits-Back.com requires no sign-up or subscription and costs only $19.99
